---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new component, prop or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

Describe the problem you're trying to solve. Is it related to a missing widget, a limitation in an existing one, an API ergonomics issue?

## Proposed solution

Sketch the API you'd like to see, ideally with a small example:

```tsx
<NewWidget foo="bar" />
```

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Links to Flutter docs, prior art in other Qwik / React libraries, etc.
